nasb.text: For where jealousy and selfish ambition exist, there is disorder and every evil thing.

esv.text: For where jealousy and selfish ambition exist, there will be disorder and every vile practice.

cnv.text: 因為凡有嫉妒和自私的地方，就必有擾亂和各樣的壞事。

ccb.text: 哪里有嫉妒和自私的野心，哪里就会有混乱和各样的恶事。

csbs.text: 要知道，哪里有嫉妒和争竞，哪里就有混乱和各样的恶事。
